rationale: v7d = v6 + 3 hazard x building interaction features.
SD_NumB = SD * NumB: surge depth times number of buildings (captures 'amount of building stock exposed to surge').
WH_NumB = WH * NumB: wave height times number of buildings.
MF_NumB = MF * NumB: momentum flux times number of buildings.
All 3 added to monotone-INC: more hazard x more buildings -> more debris (positive monotone).

Hypothesis: explicit interaction features should boost the relative importance of hazard variables in the prediction; v6 currently has multi-hazard group importance = 12.6 m^3 (lowest of all 4 feature groups).
